description: Source-of-truth tracking for generated pet assets. Roblox runtime config still lives in configs/pets.lua.

defaults.style_prompt: cute low-poly Roblox pet simulator companion, toy-like proportions, clean silhouette, bright readable colors, single-character model, game-ready mesh

pets.prompt: cute low-poly bear pet companion for a Roblox pet simulator, rounded ears, small paws, friendly face, warm brown fur, chunky toy-like silhouette

meshy.notes: A Meshy replacement was generated on 2026-05-26 but is not used because the original Bear better matches the existing art style.

pets.notes: Runtime uses the original remote Bear asset for style consistency. The Meshy-generated Bear source remains in assets/source/pets/bear_basic.glb as an unused experiment.

pets.notes: Existing Roblox asset id from configs/pets.lua; source model file is not present locally yet.
